comments: Tommy thanks Richard Skinner for presenting last week's show.
Tommy's end of show comments are missing.

transcript.text: Well, hello there. This is TV on the Radio here. Thomas the jet-lagged Vance. And welcome once again to The Friday Rock Show.
Right, many thanks to Richard Skinner for last week's program and also for doing Rock On.
Tonight we have the first of our Reading Rock Shows. Some of the bands that hit the twin stages at the 21st annual Reading Festival just a couple of weekends ago.
And this evening we have for your edification and delight, and for your ears as well, sets by Rose Tattoo, Saga, Billy Squire and Girl School.
No Friday Night Connection tonight, because it's all straight down the line good boogie.
This evening, we start off with a set that was laid down on the stage by Rose Tattoo,
including the introduction by Angry Anderson.

The Butcher and Fast Eddie, Assault and Battery,
which is the title track of their new album,
Bad Boy for Love, Man's Ill Madness, and One of the Boys.
It's 26 minutes now to 11 o'clock on the Friday Rock Show.
